description:
Windows-native menu bar app for OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats.

Win-CodexBar is a Windows-native desktop app for viewing OpenAI Codex and Claude Code usage stats from a small Tauri shell.
v0.23.5 improves provider refresh performance, keeps cached data visible during refreshes, adds safer diagnostics, redacts secret-bearing errors, hardens desktop command inputs, and verifies updater downloads before applying them.
